violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the womens toilet room is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and kitchen carts have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The kitchen door and ceiling are in poor repair, with paint flaking off and missing in areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
